options.title: Minimal Change
options.expectation: Fastest path with least refactor. Keeps architecture close to current behavior.

options.title: Balanced
options.expectation: Pragmatic modernization. Improves cloud-native patterns while controlling migration risk.

options.title: Aggressive Modernization
options.expectation: Largest architecture change and optimization potential. Highest effort and program risk.

strategyReport.rationale: Blockers/high-risk findings detected. Start with the lowest-risk migration path.

readiness.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  blockers["Blockers: 1"]
  findings["Findings: H1/M0/L0"]
  unknowns["Unknowns: 2"]
  confidence["Confidence: 0.9"]
  score["Readiness Score: 47"]
  blockers --> score
  findings --> score
  unknowns --> score
  confidence --> score

notes: ROI includes VM sustainment overhead and OS-level security maintenance exposure.
Assumptions are defaults and should be adjusted with real finance and operations data.

assessments.summary: Customer impact is possible and should be controlled with staged rollout.
Outage risk is manageable with blue/green checkpoints.
Security posture is improving but requires validation of controls.
Operational effort is moderate and should be planned per component wave.

topRisks.summary: Customer impact is possible and should be controlled with staged rollout.
Outage risk is manageable with blue/green checkpoints.
Security posture is improving but requires validation of controls.

recommendedActions: Resolve blockers and re-run readiness before scheduling cutover.
Assign owners for open unknowns and capture resolution evidence.
Use blue/green traffic shifts with rollback checkpoints at each gate.

stages.title: Deploy generated workloads
successCriteria: Scheduled jobs validated in dry-run mode
stages.rollbackTrigger: Repeated startup failures or missing dependencies

stages.title: Shift 5% traffic to green
stages.rollbackTrigger: Error budget breach or dependency failures

stages.title: Shift 25% traffic to green
stages.rollbackTrigger: SLO breach, DB error spikes, or operator abort

stages.title: Shift 50% traffic to green
stages.rollbackTrigger: Sustained queue backlog growth or health probe failures

stages.title: Shift 100% traffic to green
stages.rollbackTrigger: Critical alert, severe performance regression, or policy breach

stages.title: Stabilization and rollback hold window
successCriteria: No critical alerts for full hold window
stages.rollbackTrigger: SLO regression or unresolved high-priority incident

rollbackSimulations.name: Health Check Failure
rollbackSimulations.trigger: Readiness probes fail for two consecutive windows
rollbackSimulations.expectedAction: Route traffic back to blue immediately and freeze green updates.

rollbackSimulations.name: SLO Breach
rollbackSimulations.trigger: Latency/error SLO breach at 25%+ traffic stage
rollbackSimulations.expectedAction: Rollback to previous stable stage and open incident workflow.

rollbackSimulations.name: Data Path Regression
rollbackSimulations.expectedAction: Abort cutover, restore blue path, and preserve diagnostics.

notes: Human sign-off is required before and after cutover execution.
